reasoning: A wealth of credible reporting and official sources confirm that Monad launched its public mainnet and its native token, MON, on November 24, 2025. On the same day, an airdrop of approximately 3.33 billion MON (3.3% of the total supply) was successfully distributed to around 76,000 eligible wallets. The total unlocked maximum circulating supply at launch was 10.8 billion MON, which indicates the airdrop and public sale allocations were immediately unlocked (while team and investor tokens were locked for a year). Additionally, MON was quickly listed on major exchanges, verifying that the tokens were swappable and not restricted just to NFTs or locked tokens. Since all the conditions—launching a token and performing a valid airdrop by Nov 30, 2025—were clearly met, this market resolves to Yes.
